name: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp.
business: Grocery Outlet is a growth-oriented extreme value retailer of quality, name-brand consumables and fresh products sold primarily through a network of independently operated stores. Each of our stores offers a fun, treasure hunt shopping experience in an easy-to-navigate, small-box format.

exposures.sentence: Grocery Outlet is a growth-oriented extreme value retailer of quality, name-brand consumables and fresh products sold primarily through a network of independently operated stores.

We have entered into partnerships with third-party grocery delivery companies to provide online shopping at our stores and we have embraced online and digital marketing, including with our mobile personalization app.
failure to maintain the security of information we hold relating to personal information or payment card data of our customers, employees and suppliers

catalysts.event: Operate certain newly opened stores in fiscal 2026 as Company-operated stores
catalysts.sentence: We plan to operate certain of our newly opened stores in fiscal 2026 as Company-operated stores for an uncertain time period with the intent to eventually transition the operation for such stores to an IO.

catalysts.event: Terminate or sublease 36 leases and close underperforming stores in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: In connection with the Optimization Plan, we determined to terminate or sublease a total of 36 leases in connection with the closure of underperforming stores in fiscal 2026 along with the termination or sublease of a distribution center facility that we are no longer utilizing.
